description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of JavaScript's native Date class, testing practical API usage and edge‑case handling. It is positioned as a light‑hearted, self‑paced multiple‑choice challenge with a supportive teaching tone. The difficulty is moderate, suitable for developers familiar with basic Date operations who want to deepen their expertise.
Topics: JavaScript Date object, Date parsing and formatting, Time zones and localization, Common pitfalls and edge cases, Comparison with third‑party date libraries
Audience: Front‑end developers, JavaScript engineers, and students who have basic experience with Date and want to improve their mastery.
